source: Motion Creative Benchmarks 2026 (Finance vertical) + CFE campaign data
creative_context: Finance audiences need trust signals and specific numbers. Price anchoring and statistics drive highest spend use ratios. Exclusivity ('early access', 'founder round') resonates for investment products. Compliance is critical — all claims must be verifiable, disclaimers required. Risk reversal ('refundable deposit', 'cancel anytime') addresses the primary objection.
